US: US10: As a coach, I can book a session for a client in the Workspace via "Book Session" CTA so that I can schedule a session with client
Step:
1. Login as Owner/Admin
2. Navigate to Calendar page on Booking feature
3. Click "Book a session" CTA button
4. Verify popup
Title: Book a session popup displayed
Expectation:
- SHOULD display "Book a session" popup
- SHOULD dim background calendar
- SHOULD trap focus inside modal

Title: Popup structure and fields
Expectation:
- SHOULD display popup name "Book a session"
- SHOULD include fields: Trainer (disabled), Client (required), Start Date (required), Start Time (required), Type (optional), Name (required), Duration (required), Location (required), Description (optional), Add note to client (optional)
- SHOULD include CTA buttons: "Book Session" | "Cancel"
- SHOULD include Close icon

Step:
1. Click "Book a session" CTA button
2. Verify prefill values
Title: CTA prefill defaults
Expectation:
- SHOULD prefill Start date = Today
- SHOULD prefill Start time = 7:00 AM
- SHOULD set Trainer to Workspace Owner (disabled)
- SHOULD set Location default to "In-person"
- SHOULD set Duration default to 30 min

Step:
1. On Calendar page, double-click a blank space on Day/Week view time slot
2. Verify prefill values
Title: Day/Week view time slot prefill
Expectation:
- SHOULD prefill Start date = clicked date
- SHOULD prefill Start time = start hour of clicked time slot

Step:
1. On Calendar page in Month view, click a blank day cell
2. Verify prefill values
Title: Month view time slot prefill
Expectation: - SHOULD prefill Start date = clicked date

Step:
1. Open "Book a session" modal
2. Click Client field
3. Verify dropdown
Title: Client dropdown opens with valid clients
Expectation:
- SHOULD show searchable dropdown with hover state
- SHOULD display clients NOT at status Pending, Archived, or Waiting Activation
- SHOULD sort clients alphabetically by name
- SHOULD load first 20 clients; scrolling loads next 20

Step:
1. Click Client field
2. Type a client name or email in the search box
3. Verify search results
Title: Client search by name or email
Expectation:
- SHOULD trigger search automatically after 200ms debounce
- SHOULD display only clients matching search input
- SHOULD show matching clients list

Step:
1. Click Client field
2. Type value with no matching client
3. Verify dropdown
Title: Client search no results
Expectation: - SHOULD display blank dropdown with message "No clients found."

Step:
1. Open Client dropdown
2. Verify each client item
Title: Client item display info
Expectation: - SHOULD display: Profile image, Client name, Client email

Step:
1. Open Client dropdown
2. Select a client
3. Verify dropdown state
Title: Select client closes dropdown
Expectation: - SHOULD close dropdown after selection

Step:
1. Click "Start date" field
2. Verify field behavior
Title: Start Date field click behavior
Expectation:
- SHOULD highlight entire current value (text selection)
- SHOULD open date picker with hover state
- SHOULD highlight currently selected date as selected state in date picker

Step:
1. Click "Start date" field
2. Type a valid date in format mmm dd, yyyy
3. Verify hover on calendar picker
Title: Start Date typing hovers calendar
Expectation:
- SHOULD hover the matching date on the calendar picker as value is typed
- Given only mmm typed: hover on 1st day of that month of current year
- Given mmm invalid: keep hover on previous date
- Given dd typed: hover on that date of selected month
- Given yyyy typed: hover on that date of selected year

Step:
1. Type date in Start Date field
2. Press Enter or click outside field and picker
3. Verify result
Title: Start Date confirmed on Enter / click outside
Expectation:
- SHOULD apply input value to Start Date field
- SHOULD close calendar picker

Step:
1. Open date picker in Start Date
2. Hover on a date outside supported range
3. Verify
Title: Out-of-range date hover shows stop icon
Expectation: - SHOULD display "stop" icon on dates outside supported range (WS creation date up to 1 year from current date)

Step:
1. Click "Start time" field
2. Verify field behavior
Title: Start Time field click behavior
Expectation:
- SHOULD highlight entire current value (text selection)
- SHOULD display time slots in 15-minute increments with hover state
- SHOULD display coach's timezone

Step:
1. Type a value into Start Time field matching an available option
2. Verify dropdown
Title: Start Time typing highlights matching option
Expectation: - SHOULD visually highlight matching option in dropdown (hover state)

Step:
1. Type value into Start Time field
2. Press Enter or click outside field and dropdown
3. Verify result
Title: Start Time confirmed on Enter / click outside
Expectation:
- SHOULD apply input value to Start Time field
- SHOULD close dropdown

Step:
1. Click Name field
2. Type a session name
3. Verify
Title: Name field allows text input
Expectation: - SHOULD allow inputting session name

Step:
1. Click Duration field
2. Verify dropdown
Title: Duration dropdown opens
Expectation: - SHOULD display time slots in a dropdown list

Step:
1. Click "Add note to client" button
2. Verify textbox appears
Title: Add note to client textbox displayed
Expectation:
- SHOULD display textbox with placeholder "Add note to client"
- SHOULD focus cursor in textbox
- SHOULD enforce 500 character limit (block input at 500)
- SHOULD show character counter when input reaches 450 characters

Step:
1. Click Type field
2. Verify dropdown
Title: Type dropdown shows active session types
Expectation:
- SHOULD display searchable list with hover state
- SHOULD show only active session types (team = current WS, is_archived = FALSE)
- SHOULD NOT show archived session types
- SHOULD sort alphabetically by name
- SHOULD load first 20; scrolling loads next 20
- Each option SHOULD display: Session type name, Duration, Location type, Number of clients (1:1)

Step:
1. Click Type field with no active session types in WS
2. Verify dropdown
Title: Type dropdown empty state
Expectation:
- SHOULD display text "No session types yet"
- SHOULD display "Create session type" CTA button
- On click SHOULD navigate to Session Type creation

Step:
1. Click Type field
2. Type a session type name in search box
3. Verify results
Title: Type search by name
Expectation:
- SHOULD trigger search after 200ms debounce
- SHOULD display only matching session types

Step:
1. Type value in Type search with no match
2. Verify dropdown
Title: Type search no results
Expectation: - SHOULD display empty dropdown with message "No result found."

Step:
1. Click Type field and select a session type
2. Verify form state
Title: Session type selected — summary and field visibility
Expectation:
- SHOULD close dropdown
- SHOULD display session type summary: color, name, duration, location, address (if provided), location note (if provided), description (if provided)
- SHOULD hide fields: Name, Duration, Location, Description
- SHOULD still display "Add note to client" field

Step:
1. Select a session type
2. Click "x" icon to clear selection
3. Verify form state
Title: Clear session type returns to Custom mode
Expectation:
- SHOULD clear session type summary section
- SHOULD return form to Custom Session mode
- SHOULD persist: Client, Start date, Start time, Add note to client values

Step:
1. Select a session type
2. Hover over "Edit" icon
3. Verify tooltip
Title: Edit icon tooltip
Expectation: - SHOULD display tooltip: "Change duration, location or description"

Step:
1. Select a session type
2. Click "Edit" icon
3. Verify overlay popup
Title: Edit session type overlay opens
Expectation:
- SHOULD display "Edit [Session type name]" popup overlay on Book Session popup
- SHOULD show message: "Changes apply to this session only."
- SHOULD auto-populate session type info
- SHOULD allow editing: Duration, Location, Description
- SHOULD display CTA: "Cancel" | "Apply"
- Apply button SHOULD be disabled by default

Step:
1. Open Edit session type overlay
2. Change a value (Duration, Location, or Description)
3. Verify Apply button
Title: Apply button enabled on value change
Expectation: - SHOULD enable Apply button when any value is changed

Step:
1. Open Edit overlay, change a value
2. Click Apply
3. Verify result
Title: Apply closes overlay and updates summary
Expectation:
- SHOULD close Edit overlay
- SHOULD display new values on session type summary section
- SHOULD return to Book Session popup

Step:
1. Open Edit overlay
2. Click Cancel or x icon
3. Verify result
Title: Cancel / x on Edit overlay preserves original data
Expectation:
- SHOULD close Edit overlay
- SHOULD display Book Session popup with session type info unchanged

AC: AC2.1: Add missing data for Session Type
Step:
1. Open Book a session modal
2. Select a session type with location type "In-person" that has both Address and Description
3. Verify display
Title: Session type with address and description displays normally
Expectation: - SHOULD display session type info as usual (no Add address / Add description links)

Step:
1. Select session type with In-person location, no Address, but Description provided
2. Verify display
Title: Missing address — Add address hyperlink shown
Expectation:
- SHOULD display "Add address" hyperlink button with hover state
- SHOULD display description as usual
- On click of "Add address" SHOULD turn into text input for address entry

Step:
1. Select session type with In-person location, no Description
2. Verify display
Title: Missing description — Add description hyperlink shown
Expectation:
- SHOULD display "Add description" hyperlink button with hover state
- On click of "Add description" SHOULD open text input for description entry

AC: AC3: Book validation and Conflict handling
Step:
1. Open Book a session modal
2. Leave one or more required fields empty
3. Click "Book Session"
4. Verify validation
Title: Required field validation on submit
Expectation:
- SHOULD highlight empty required fields
- SHOULD display inline validation message for each empty required field

Step:
1. Fill all required fields with a future session (no existing overlap)
2. Click "Book Session"
3. Verify result
Title: Successful booking — no overlap
Expectation:
- SHOULD save session to database
- SHOULD close popup
- SHOULD render session on calendar at correct start time and duration
- SHOULD navigate coach to the calendar date of the new session

Step:
1. Fill all required fields with a future session that overlaps an existing session
2. Click "Book Session"
3. Verify overlap confirmation popup
Title: Overlap detected — confirmation popup shown
Expectation:
- SHOULD display confirmation popup with title "Session Overlap"
- SHOULD display description: "You already have another session during this time. Are you sure you want to book this session anyway?"
- SHOULD show actions: "Cancel" | "Book Anyway" (focused)

Step:
1. Overlap confirmation popup is open
2. Click "Cancel" or x icon
3. Verify result
Title: Dismiss overlap popup returns to Book Session
Expectation:
- SHOULD close confirmation modal
- SHOULD return to Book a session popup with all inputted data kept

Step:
1. Overlap confirmation popup is open
2. Click "Book Anyway"
3. Verify result
Title: Book Anyway saves overlapping session
Expectation: - SHOULD save session (same behavior as no-overlap success)

Step:
1. Fill all required fields with a past end date & time
2. Click "Book Session"
3. Verify past date confirmation popup
Title: Past session — past date confirmation popup shown
Expectation:
- SHOULD display popup name "Session Date Is In the Past"
- SHOULD display message: "You selected a Date and time that is in the past. This session will be saved as Completed. No client communication will be sent. Are you sure you want to book this session anyway?"
- SHOULD show actions: "Cancel" | "Book Anyway" (focused)
- SHOULD NOT perform overlap check

Step:
1. Past date confirmation popup is open
2. Click "Cancel" or x icon
3. Verify result
Title: Dismiss past date popup returns to Book Session
Expectation:
- SHOULD close confirmation modal
- SHOULD return to Book a session popup with all inputted data kept

Step:
1. Past date confirmation popup is open
2. Click "Book Anyway"
3. Verify result
Title: Book Anyway saves past session
Expectation: - SHOULD save session (same behavior as no-overlap success)

Step:
1. Book session successfully
2. Verify UI feedback
Title: Success toast and calendar update
Expectation:
- SHOULD close Book a session popup
- SHOULD store data in session and booking tables
- SHOULD display toast: "Session has been scheduled."
- SHOULD display session on coach's calendar in current view

Step:
1. Attempt to book session — API returns error
2. Verify UI feedback
Title: Failed booking — popup stays open
Expectation:
- SHOULD keep Book a session popup open
- SHOULD persist all coach's input data
- SHOULD keep CTA enabled
- SHOULD display toast: "Failed to add a session. Please try again"

Step:
1. Input data into any field in Book a session popup
2. Click "Cancel" button or x icon
3. Verify result
Title: Cancel / x discards changes and closes popup
Expectation:
- SHOULD discard unsaved changes
- SHOULD close the popup

US: US11: As a coach, I can view the sessions on my calendar so that I can manage it
Step:
1. Login as Owner/Admin with Booking feature enabled
2. Navigate to Calendar page
3. Verify calendar display
Title: Calendar displays all WS sessions
Expectation:
- SHOULD display calendar view with all sessions associated with the Workspace
- SHOULD render sessions according to currently selected calendar view (Day / Week / Month)

Step:
1. Navigate to Calendar page with no sessions in the selected date range
2. Verify calendar
Title: Empty calendar grid — no sessions
Expectation:
- SHOULD display empty calendar grid
- SHOULD NOT show any session cards or popovers
- SHOULD maintain full calendar navigation and view switching

Step:
1. Navigate to Calendar page with sessions in the selected date range
2. Verify sessions displayed
Title: Non-canceled sessions shown on calendar
Expectation: - SHOULD display sessions that are NOT canceled with hover state

Step:
1. Switch to Day view
2. Verify session layout
Title: Day view — vertical time-slot layout
Expectation:
- SHOULD display sessions in vertical time-slot layout with hover state
- Session block SHOULD be aligned with its Start Time based on coach's timezone
- Session SHOULD begin exactly at the corresponding time slot (same as Google Calendar behavior)

Step:
1. Day view — observe session tied to a session type vs custom session color
2. Verify color
Title: Day view session color — type-tied vs custom
Expectation:
- SHOULD display session color based on selected session type (if tied to type)
- SHOULD display color selected during creation (if custom session)

Step:
1. Day view — observe past vs current session display
2. Verify color distinction
Title: Day view past/current session color distinction
Expectation:
- SHOULD visually distinguish past sessions (end_time < current_time) from current/upcoming sessions
- SHOULD apply to all session statuses: Completed, Scheduled, Early canceled, Late canceled
- SHOULD apply distinct hover and selected states

Step:
1. Day view — create or view overlapping sessions in same time range
2. Verify layout
Title: Day view — overlapping sessions stacked horizontally
Expectation:
- SHOULD display overlapping sessions side by side (horizontally stacked)
- SHOULD apply to fully and partially overlapping sessions
- Width of each session block SHOULD be reduced proportionally
- Given vacant slot, sessions SHOULD sort to the left side

Step:
1. Day view — observe overlapping sessions sort order
2. Verify order
Title: Day view overlapping sessions sort order
Expectation:
- SHOULD sort by start_time ascending (earlier on left)
- If same start_time: sort by duration (longer on left)
- If same start_time and duration: sort by created_at (older on left)

Step:
1. Day view — view session block with content exceeding available space
2. Verify
Title: Session content truncated when exceeds space
Expectation:
- SHOULD truncate session content if it exceeds available space
- SHOULD allow clicking session to open Session Detail Popover for full details

Step:
1. Day view — view a session with duration <= 15 mins
2. Verify block height and content
Title: Session <= 15 min block height and content
Expectation:
- SHOULD display block height = 1/4 of 1-hour time slot (fixed, not reduced further)
- SHOULD display session info in 1 line: Client name, Start time, Session name

Step:
1. Day view — view a session with duration > 15 mins and <= 45 mins
2. Verify block
Title: Session > 15 min and <= 45 min — 1-line info
Expectation:
- SHOULD display block height = duration / 60 mins of 1-hour slot
- SHOULD display session info in 1 line: Client name, Start time, Session name

Step:
1. Day view — view a session with duration > 45 mins and < 60 mins
2. Verify block
Title: Session > 45 min and < 60 min — 2-line info
Expectation:
- SHOULD display block height = duration / 60 mins of 1-hour slot
- Line 1: Client name, Start time
- Line 2: Session name

Step:
1. Day view — view a session with duration >= 60 mins where Start time and End time are in the same am/pm
2. Verify block
Title: Session >= 60 min — same am/pm time display
Expectation:
- SHOULD display session info in 3 lines
- Line 1: Client name
- Line 2: Start time – end time (both with am/pm displayed)
- Line 3: Session name

Step:
1. Day view — view a session >= 60 mins where Start time and End time are NOT in same day AND NOT same am/pm
2. Verify time display
Title: Session >= 60 min — different am/pm time display
Expectation:
- SHOULD display only am/pm for End time (NOT for Start time)
- Line 2: Start time – End time (am/pm on end time only)

Step:
1. Day view — view an Early canceled session
2. Verify display
Title: Early canceled session display
Expectation:
- SHOULD display session with dash-line style
- SHOULD display Client name with strikethrough
- SHOULD apply past date and current date states

Step:
1. Day view — view a Late canceled session
2. Verify display
Title: Late canceled session display
Expectation:
- SHOULD display session with dash-line style
- SHOULD display "i" icon
- SHOULD display Client name with strikethrough
- SHOULD apply past date and current date states

Step:
1. Switch to Week view
2. Verify session rendering
Title: Week view — sessions across 7 day columns
Expectation:
- SHOULD display sessions across 7 day columns
- SHOULD stack overlapping sessions within same time range with hover state
- SHOULD sort sessions by start time ascending; same start time sorted by created time
- SHOULD display multi-day/all-day sessions at the top of the calendar area
- Across-days sessions SHOULD display on both days (split at midnight)
- SHOULD apply same session color rules as Day view

Step:
1. Switch to Month view
2. Verify session rendering
Title: Month view — condensed sessions per date cell
Expectation:
- SHOULD display sessions as condensed items within each date cell with hover state
- SHOULD show session info: Start time, Client name
- SHOULD apply same session color and past/current distinction as Day view
- SHOULD handle responsive display based on device screen
- SHOULD display multi-day/all-day sessions across days on calendar

Step:
1. Month view — sessions exceed visible limit for a date
2. Verify overflow indicator and popover
Title: Month view "N more" indicator and popover
Expectation:
- SHOULD display "[N] more" indicator when sessions exceed visible limit
- On click SHOULD open popover listing all sessions for that date (MAX HEIGHT: 292px)
- SHOULD allow scroll to view full list
- SHOULD display sessions sorted by start time ascending (same start time: by created time)
- SHOULD allow clicking any session to open session detail popup
- SHOULD close popover on click outside

Step:
1. On Calendar page, click on a session block
2. Verify popover
Title: Session detail popover opens with all fields
Expectation:
- SHOULD open session detail popover
- SHOULD display: Session status (Scheduled / Completed / Early Cancel / Late Cancel), Session name, Client name, Client avatar, Date, Duration, Location type, Address (if defined), Location note (if defined), Description (if defined), Note to client (if defined), Trainer name and avatar
- SHOULD handle long notes/description display

Title: Session time display — same day same am/pm
Expectation: - SHOULD display start time – end time with am/pm shown for both (e.g., 9:00 AM – 10:00 AM)

Title: Session time display — different days
Expectation: - SHOULD display as: <Date>, <Start time> - <Date, End time>

Title: Quick action icons in popover
Expectation:
- SHOULD display "Edit" icon with tooltip "Edit session" on hover
- SHOULD display "Delete" icon with tooltip "Cancel session" on hover
- SHOULD display "x" icon with NO hover state
